items.name: Gluten‑free oatmeal (made with oat milk) topped with banana and almond butter
Greek yogurt (plain, gluten‑free) with honey and pumpkin seeds
Grilled chicken breast quinoa bowl with roasted sweet potatoes, spinach, cherry tomatoes, and olive oil dressing
Rice cake topped with peanut butter and sliced strawberries
Baked salmon, wild‑rice pilaf, steamed broccoli, and avocado dressing
Cottage cheese with pineapple chunks and a sprinkle of chia seeds
Gluten‑free whole grain toast with avocado smash and poached eggs
Smoothie (protein powder, almond milk, frozen berries, spinach, flaxseed)
Turkey lettuce wraps with quinoa, shredded carrots, cucumber, and tahini sauce
Apple slices with almond butter
Grilled lean steak, baked sweet potato wedges, sautéed green beans, and olive oil drizzle
Greek kefir with granola (gluten‑free) and blueberries
Chia pudding made with coconut milk, topped with mango and toasted coconut flakes
Hard‑boiled eggs (2) and a handful of mixed nuts
Grilled shrimp salad with mixed greens, quinoa, avocado, orange segments, and citrus vinaigrette
Gluten‑free granola bar (nut‑based)
Roasted chicken thigh, millet pilaf, roasted carrots, and pesto sauce
Ricotta cheese with honey drizzle and sliced figs
Protein pancakes (gluten‑free flour) with maple syrup and blueberries
Edamame beans seasoned with sea salt
Beef stir‑fry with brown rice, bell peppers, snow peas, and soy‑free tamari
Banana and a tablespoon of peanut butter
Baked cod, quinoa salad with olives, cherry tomatoes, feta (lactose‑free), and olive oil
Protein shake (gluten‑free protein powder, almond milk) with a dash of cinnamon
Greek yogurt parfait with gluten‑free granola, raspberries, and chia seeds
Rice crackers with hummus and sliced cucumber
Grilled turkey burger on lettuce bun, sweet potato fries, and coleslaw (gluten‑free mayo)
Pear slices with walnuts
Lentil stew with carrots, celery, and kale served over brown rice
Cottage cheese with peach chunks and a sprinkle of pumpkin seed granola (gluten‑free)
Smooth bowl: blended frozen banana, almond butter, protein powder, oat milk, topped with gluten‑free granola and cacao nibs
Turkey slice roll‑ups with avocado and gluten‑free tortilla strips
Salmon poke bowl with sushi‑grade salmon, cauliflower rice, edamame, pickled ginger, and sesame oil
Gluten‑free rice cake with cottage cheese and cherry tomatoes
Pork tenderloin, roasted parsnips, sautéed spinach with garlic, and mustard sauce
Greek yogurt with dark chocolate shavings and sliced kiwi
Egg white scramble with spinach, mushrooms, and gluten‑free toast, side of mixed berries
Almond butter energy balls (gluten‑free oat and dates)
Chicken shawarma bowl with quinoa, cucumber, tomato, tahini drizzle, and pickles (gluten‑free)
Orange segments and a handful of pistachios
Grilled tilapia, wild‑rice risotto with peas, and asparagus spears with lemon zest
Protein pudding (silken tofu, cocoa powder, vanilla, gluten‑free protein powder) topped with strawberries
